copy.description:
Brookline Select Board Meeting - January 13, 2026

During the Brookline Select Board meeting on January 13, 2026, the board discussed several topics, including an upcoming MLK Day event scheduled for January 27 and the nomination process for the Brookline Commission for Women. The board also addressed the implementation of public health vending machines at libraries to dispense safe sex kits and health-promoting materials to support community wellness efforts.
